summary: Integrated cross-border payments and spend management platform combining FX risk management, corporate cards, and multi-currency accounts on a modern serverless architecture with AI-driven automation and agentic workflows.
engagementTypeDescription: Sell-side product competitiveness and technical diligence assessment
challenge: Evaluating product competitiveness and technology scalability of an integrated cross-border payments and spend management platform undergoing a multi-year migration from legacy architecture to a modern serverless platform.
solution: Confirmed a differentiated product outperforming larger competitors with a modern cloud-native architecture supporting scalable growth, elite-level engineering metrics, and production-grade AI capabilities, with technical debt confined to transitional legacy operations.

summary: Government affairs SaaS platform unifying legislative tracking, stakeholder engagement, PAC management, and grassroots advocacy with an AI chatbot assistant, proprietary data flywheel moat, and scalable cloud infrastructure.
challenge: Re-engagement of project Ecological to quantify additional AI enablement. Assessing technology maturity and integration readiness of a GovTech SaaS platform built on a hybrid Python/Django and legacy C#/.NET stack following two bolt-on acquisitions, with an active AI product expansion underway.
solution: Validated robust cloud-native architecture on AWS EKS with 99.95% uptime and 95%+ net revenue retention, confirmed successful integration of two acquired products, assessed AI chatbot viability with proprietary data flywheel, and identified legacy .NET technical debt requiring prioritised remediation.

summary: Cloud-augmented platform providing accounts receivable management, medical revenue recovery, insurance follow-up, and collection services using core collections workflow system with modern peripheral integrations.
challenge: Assessing technology readiness for revenue growth and integration compatibility of a healthcare collections platform built on legacy FACS system.
solution: Validated strong operational foundation with SOC 2 Type 2 compliance, efficient service delivery through pragmatic commercial platforms, and identified long-range platform transition planning needs while confirming scalability without disproportionate investment.

summary: Post-acquisition integration combining two healthcare revenue cycle platforms to optimize margin through automation-driven insurance follow-up, consolidate bad debt operations, and unify foundational IT infrastructure.
challenge: Integrating two healthcare revenue cycle platforms while capturing margin opportunities through VARR automation and consolidating foundational IT operations.
solution: Developed phased integration strategy prioritizing Insurance Follow-Up migration to Arrow for VARR automation, Bad Debt consolidation to Atlas for capacity optimization, and foundational IT consolidation for efficiency gains of $290-480k OTC and $250-375k annual savings.

summary: Cloud-based suite for surgical centers providing practice management, scheduling, electronic health records, and billing solutions.
challenge: Creating a technology roadmap for a surgical platform.
solution: Designed a 12-month plan to containerize legacy applications (Docker) and move to a modern multi-tenant AWS architecture.

summary: Cloud-based shop management SaaS for collision-repair body shops and multi-shop operators, providing a visual production workboard, job costing, scheduling, financial tracking, mobile photo and document capture, and integrations with major accounting and estimating systems.
challenge: Value-creation planning for migrating a legacy desktop body-shop management toolset to a cloud-native multi-tenant SaaS serving collision-repair facilities and multi-shop operators, with integrations to major accounting platforms and estimating systems.
solution: Recommended migrating on-premise desktop tools to a Node.js / AWS cloud architecture with iOS and Android mobile apps to eliminate client deployment burden and unify production, financial, and customer workflows.

summary: Technology-enabled mission services platform providing transportation lifecycle management, workforce coordination, compliance tracking, and government reporting for federal agencies through a proprietary FedRAMP-authorized operational system.
engagementTypeDescription: Sell-side technology evaluation for investor readiness
challenge: Demonstrating technology maturity, platform defensibility, and scalability of a proprietary transportation operations platform operating within FedRAMP-authorized infrastructure to prospective investors, with a carve-out in progress.
solution: Validated mature, vertically integrated technology-enabled services organization with 99.97% uptime, 1,500+ platform enhancements since 2017, FedRAMP Moderate authorization with 150 NIST 800-53 controls, and articulated investment opportunities in data architecture maturation, AI-enabled analytics, and Zero Trust alignment.

summary: AI-enabled healthcare marketing agency with proprietary omnichannel analytics platform, AI copywriting pipeline, social intelligence tools, and workflow automation for pharma brand commercialization.
engagementTypeDescription: Sell-side AI competitive analysis and technology evaluation
challenge: Evaluating AI strategy defensibility, competitive positioning, and disruption risk for a healthcare marketing agency facing multi-front AI threats from in-house pharma capabilities, AI-native competitors, and commoditization of content generation services.
solution: Identified fragmented AI infrastructure across four early-stage tools with low defensibility, positioned the proprietary omnichannel analytics platform as the most defensible asset, and delivered a prioritized AI roadmap to strengthen investor narrative ahead of exit.

summary: Unified cloud platform providing integrated company registry, fund administration, employee share plans, and equity management services with automation.
challenge: Planning international expansion for a registry platform.
solution: Mapped expansion complexity across Singapore, UK, and Canada to forecast R&D investment needs.

summary: Unified platform for legislative tracking, grassroots advocacy, and PAC management with integrated data scraping and AI capabilities.
engagementTypeDescription: Sell-side product competitiveness and technical diligence assessment
challenge: Showcasing a high-volume data platform processing high-volume data processing.
solution: Produced an external report validating the Python/Django architecture and the modernization roadmap for legacy 'legacy product' products.

summary: AI-powered intranet platform designed to engage employees through personalized internal communications, social interaction, and knowledge sharing tools.
challenge: Validating a global R&D organization for a significant annual recurring revenue intranet software provider.
solution: Verified 'key financial performance metric' financial performance and low R&D costs (low percentage of ARR) to prove efficiency to investors.

summary: Cloud-native SaaS platform for incident management, audits, and compliance tracking utilizing a metadata-driven engine for high configurability.
challenge: Optimizing R&D for a .NET/React platform.
solution: Identified opportunities to use customer data to drive roadmap decisions and build engineering depth in AI/ML.

summary: Cloud-native platform using mathematical optimization and large-scale simulation for scenario-based supply chain design and risk assessment.
challenge: Validating a cloud-native supply chain design platform.
solution: Recommended a 'refactoring program' to target complex code modules in the solver components.

summary: Public safety SaaS suite of nine products for police, fire, and dispatch teams, covering policy management, training, quality assurance, and community engagement.
challenge: Assessing whether a small-team, informal-SDLC SaaS platform built on a single multi-tenant SQL Server database and mixed legacy .NET versions can support the acquirer's expected revenue growth and enterprise-scale customers without disproportionate investment.
solution: Confirmed that the cohesive Microsoft stack (C#/.NET/SQL Server/Azure Government Cloud) and stateless OAuth/OIDC identity layer provide a sound basis for scaling; identified targeted, low-complexity investments — managed-services migration, multi-tenant schema audit, read-replicas plus caching, .NET 8 consolidation, MVC pagination, full-scope third-party pen test, engineering-leader hire, and product management maturation — all absorbable by the acquirer's existing resources.

summary: Cloud-native platform specializing in distributing content and driving employee advocacy across various social media and messaging channels.
challenge: Rapid 'First Impressions' assessment of a target with 1.5M lines of code.
solution: Validated the use of TypeScript/React but flagged potential data breach history requiring dark web scans.

summary: Multi-asset cloud platform for trading, risk management, and prime brokerage, featuring modular service-oriented architecture and messaging.
challenge: Validating a trading platform covering extensive financial instrument coverage.
solution: Assessed the migration to Snowflake for data independence and validated the modular service-oriented architecture.

summary: Telemedicine platform and patient portal for hormones and clinical treatment management including provider and administrative workflows.
challenge: Evaluating a direct-to-consumer telemedicine model.
solution: Confirmed a 'Growth-Ready' SDLC but recommended replacing legacy framework with Laravel to reduce maintenance costs.

summary: Cloud-native platform providing end-to-end air cargo management, revenue optimization, and international eCommerce shipping solutions for carriers.
engagementTypeDescription: Sell-side product competitiveness and technical diligence assessment
challenge: Developing the 'Product & Technology aspects of the Investment Thesis' for an airline cargo platform.
solution: Helped the client demonstrate 'increased revenue potential for airline partners' to potential buyers.

summary: Cloud-native SaaS platform facilitates real estate rentals by allowing landlords to list properties and renters to negotiate terms.
engagementTypeDescription: Sell-side product competitiveness and technical diligence assessment
challenge: Producing an independent technology overview to validate scalability, extensibility, and security posture of a single-founder-built cloud-native real estate rentals SaaS platform ahead of investor outreach.
solution: Confirmed a modern serverless architecture on Firebase/GCP with TypeScript/Vue/Nuxt frontend and event-driven backend supports growth without disproportionate investment; validated fit-for-purpose security including AES-256 encryption, RBAC, passwordless login, and 30-day PII expiry; flagged opportunities to broaden MLS data integrations, mature generative AI capabilities, extend the enterprise API for partner ecosystem, and expand into commercial real estate and lease/deposit handling.

summary: Platform providing registration, titling, and collateral management solutions for vehicle inquiries and processing registration transactions for lenders.
challenge: Analyzing extensive codebase for a registration and titling platform.
solution: Identified high code complexity in legacy 'legacy registration system' products and recommended moving from AngularJS to ReactJS.

summary: Knowledge work automation platform using metadata-centric organization to facilitate document and workflow management for enterprise customers.
engagementTypeDescription: Sell-side product competitiveness and technical diligence assessment
challenge: Preparing a substantial revenue document management platform for transaction.
solution: Coached the team to handle 'Rude Q&A' regarding legacy code and validated the metadata-centric 'platform consolidation' consolidation strategy.

summary: Specialized chemical blending and toll manufacturing services utilizing integrated cloud-based systems for sales, order management, and production.
challenge: Evaluating legacy systems for a chemical manufacturing provider.
solution: Benchmarked IT maturity against 'Tech-Enabled' industry standards to identify operational gaps.

summary: Marketing automation platform for multi-channel lead generation and customer acquisition campaigns targeting specialized vertical market segments.
engagementTypeDescription: Sell-side product competitiveness and technical diligence assessment
challenge: Demonstrating scalability for a substantial revenue event management platform handling substantial data volume.
solution: Validated the customer data platform and AWS RDS architecture to support a clean external investor report.

summary: End-to-end programmatic advertising platform including DSP, SSP, and ad server functionality optimized for digital signage and outdoor media.
challenge: Auditing a DSP/SSP platform processing high-volume transaction processing.
solution: Validated the scalability of the Go/Python backend but flagged identified technical debt items for remediation.

summary: B2B2C global platform offering identity resolution and fraud detection services through bespoke user experiences and security controls.
challenge: Carving out a global identity security company from a major insurance parent.
solution: Designed a plan to replace parent-provided IT services and establish standalone operations.

summary: Software solutions for organ, blood, and plasma management supporting regulatory compliance and process management for health systems.
challenge: Assessing a transplant management system handling sensitive biological data.
solution: Identified 'over-coupled' Docker containers and recommended a move to distinct instances to prevent outages.

summary: Platform connecting education with career pathways through industry certifications, aptitude discovery tools, and real-time analytics for students.
challenge: Evaluating an education-to-career pathway platform for post-acquisition integration.
solution: Confirmed the Snowflake/Matillion data pipeline would support smooth data integration.

summary: Low-code enterprise workflow automation platform for healthcare data management, EHR migration, and ETL of legacy electronic health records into modern systems with generative AI capabilities.
challenge: Identifying integration, security, and platform risks across a HIPAA-regulated healthcare data platform targeted for acquisition, with focus on the company's ability to merge cleanly with the acquirer's stack.
solution: Confirmed no material technology risks to the investment, validated HITRUST r2 certified security posture and a fit-for-purpose low-code platform, while flagging OWASP Top 10 code weaknesses and recommending OSS governance, OAuth 2.0 migration, and a more scalable ERP as the company scales.

summary: Platform facilitating auto sales closing services through remote signings, identity verification, and encrypted digital documentation for dealers.
challenge: Ensuring a remote notary platform could scale revenue without disproportionate R&D cost.
solution: Recommended replacing contractor teams with FTEs and implementing automated CI/CD pipelines.

summary: Innovative networking solutions providing secure access service edge capabilities and business phone systems for managed service providers.
challenge: Proving integration readiness for a data integration service company.
solution: Demonstrated that the SaaS-based back-office operations would require 'minimal technical consolidation' for the acquirer.

summary: Technology-enabled service facilitating data ingestion between e-commerce stores, ERP systems, and enterprise data systems via EDI connectors.
engagementTypeDescription: Sell-side product competitiveness and technical diligence assessment
challenge: Proving integration readiness for a data integration service company.
solution: Demonstrated that the SaaS-based back-office operations would require 'minimal technical consolidation' for the acquirer.

summary: Advanced planning and scheduling platform solving complex manufacturing use cases using combinatorial heuristics for automotive and aerospace.
challenge: Assessing a scheduling solution for complex manufacturing constraints.
solution: Recommended developing a new integration platform to facilitate data interchange with the acquirer’s MES offerings.

summary: Tech-enabled suite of applications automating manual tasks and workflow processes across the investment fund management lifecycle.
challenge: Assessing a 20-application 'enterprise suite' platform for financial funds.
solution: Validated the 'Buy vs. Build' strategy for enterprise systems and the use of RPA for event-driven business rules.

summary: Information governance SaaS platform serving large enterprises, regulated industries, and government agencies with an integrated suite for records management, discovery, content migration, and SAP–SharePoint linking.
challenge: Sell-side investor technology assessment of a multi-product information governance SaaS platform, validating scalability, security posture, and the ability to execute on cross-sell, international expansion, and M&A consolidation.
solution: Confirmed the .NET/Azure/SQL stack, SOC 2 Type 2 on the Records and Physical products, Azure DevOps CI/CD with Scaled Agile, and Aha!-driven product management as credible growth foundations; validated the in-progress unified GRC UI and Stratus microservices back-end as the cross-sell vehicle; flagged multi-tenant refactoring of Physical, Rackspace-to-Azure consolidation of Discover, SOC 2 extension to Discover, FedRAMP consideration, automated OSS/vulnerability scanning, and support metrics (FRT/ART/CSAT) as key workstreams.

summary: Tech-enabled services for healthcare revenue cycle management, including insurance collections and debt recovery, utilizing internal data software.
challenge: Validating revenue cycle management systems for hospitals.
solution: Flagged critical risks in the use of legacy system and recommended a modernization plan for custom ETL processes.

summary: Carve-out SaaS learning management and eCommerce platform delivering online courses, multi-course packages, and certificates in early care, education, and human services to child care centers and individual practitioners.
challenge: Buy-side assessment of whether a ten-year-old ColdFusion/Lucee LMS and eCommerce platform, running in a shared Azure account and supported by a single transitioning developer, can be carved out, migrated, and remediated without disproportionate investment.
solution: Confirmed the multi-tenant SaaS platform on Azure, its normalized SQL Server schema, and Rackspace-managed infrastructure are fit-for-purpose; prioritized a lift-and-shift of the application and database VMs into a dedicated Azure account, AzureAD replacement of the custom IAM (unlocking SSO/MFA for StraighterLine integration), SHA-1 → SHA-256 password hashing, annual third-party pen testing, and UI/UX and BI hiring to mitigate single-developer key-person risk; estimated $140k–$410k one-time and $150k–$520k annualized.

summary: Computerized maintenance management system manages preventive maintenance for equipment, vehicles, and facility infrastructures.
challenge: Modernizing a 30-year-old maintenance management system for the cloud.
solution: Proposed a re-architecture plan to move from legacy on-premise systems to a modern SaaS-ready tech stack.

summary: Manufacturing operation leveraging ERP systems for production, inventory, and logistics, specializing in food ingredient taxonomies and supply chain management.
engagementTypeDescription: Sell-side product competitiveness and technical diligence assessment
challenge: Preparing a food & beverage manufacturer with legacy BPCS ERP systems for sale.
solution: Delivered internal recommendations to articulate the IT turnaround story and defend technical debt in Oracle/legacy ERP systems to potential buyers.

summary: Comprehensive virtual health and well-being platform providing 24/7 medical and mental health care services for college students.
challenge: Proving the scalability of a mental health platform for students.
solution: Validated a modern React/Node.js tech stack with substantial codebase and 'no technical debt' affecting the roadmap.

summary: SaaS platform providing real estate investors educational resources, investment calculators, forums, and a marketplace for professional services.
engagementTypeDescription: Sell-side product competitiveness and technical diligence assessment
challenge: Proving the platform readiness of a real estate investing community.
solution: Highlighted an exceptional strong customer satisfaction metrics and a clear roadmap to demonstrate long-term growth potential.

summary: Cloud-native payment facilitation platform providing engagement and management solutions for government, healthcare, and higher education transactions.
engagementTypeDescription: Sell-side product competitiveness and technical diligence assessment
challenge: Positioning a complex payments platform with 7 distinct products for exit.
solution: Validated the 'microservices architecture' microservices architecture and highlighted a majority of resources to maintenance to prove operational maturity to investors.

summary: Medical technology platform offering aggregated electronic health records data and a web application for oncology research insights.
challenge: Determining if an oncology platform could support a 3x increase in volume.
solution: Validated the containerized architecture and recommended building an AI/ML curation tool to replace manual workflows.

summary: Software providing comprehensive security features, including password management, sign-on management, and compliance mapping for small businesses.
challenge: Assessing a cybersecurity firm aiming to democratize protection for SMBs.
solution: Validated the platform's ability to scale from 5,000 to 25,000 active users.

summary: SaaS platform for government regulatory entities to manage inspections, permits, workflow management, and reporting for public safety.
challenge: Assessing a regulatory permit platform's ability to grow revenue 3-4X.
solution: Recommended integrating a leading IAM PaaS to replace custom authentication and implementing automated load testing.

summary: Cloud-based PaaS streamlining inventory management and vendor data integration for independent grocers to optimize pricing.
challenge: Assessing a pricing engine coupled to the third-party platform PaaS.
solution: Flagged 'Critical' risk in third-party platform dependency; recommended immediate refactoring into interface-driven services.

summary: Customer portal and backend system providing legal protection, roadside assistance, and insurance services to commercial truck drivers.
engagementTypeDescription: Sell-side product competitiveness and technical diligence assessment
challenge: Sell-side preparation for a driver safety and compliance platform.
solution: Verified the maturity of the RESTful API and Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA) to support a smooth transition for the buyer.

summary: Configurable SaaS applications streamlining food safety compliance auditing and management for multi-location food services.
challenge: Assessing scalability of inventory apps for grocery operations.
solution: Recommended formal business impact analysis (BIA) to model ransomware and outage risks.

summary: Intelligent Document Processing platform utilizing composite AI to automate workflows by extracting and understanding data from documents.
challenge: Validating an 'Intelligent Document Processing' (IDP) company.
solution: Verified the academic depth of the data science team and assessed the NLP algorithms driving the product.

summary: European contract research organization running full-service clinical trials across EU, Middle East, and Africa on a cloud-first SaaS stack anchored by the SecuTrial electronic case report form platform.
challenge: Assessing whether the cloud-first IT stack and third-party SecuTrial eCRF (on a 14-year-old WebObjects framework) can absorb 30% annual transaction growth (5× over five years) within a $200k ceiling while maintaining GDPR and MPDG compliance.
solution: Confirmed the cloud SaaS portfolio (SecuTrial, Microsoft 365, Sophos, Veeam, ISO 27001-certified noris-network hosting) is fit-for-purpose over a five-year horizon, with the perpetual 50-concurrent-trial SecuTrial license covering near-term scale; flagged dated WebObjects architecture and eventual need for ~100 additional trial licenses; recommended identifying an alternate eCRF as a contingency, annual third-party pen testing, DR simulation, documented SLAs, formal GDPR audit, and promoting the contract DPO to a full-time role.

summary: SaaS platform providing independent grocers with automated price reduction, ordering, risk management, and sales reporting analytics.
challenge: Assessing a pricing optimization platform for independent grocers.
solution: Validated the AWS/PostgreSQL architecture but recommended defining a data retention policy to manage storage growth.

summary: Talent management platform streamlining location-based hiring and management workflows designed for the needs of the hourly workforce.

On-demand charter bus marketplace (apps for operators, drivers, and customers) growing at 300% year-over-year, with an imminent launch of an adjacent Transport Management System (TMS) SaaS for bus fleet operators.
challenge: Value-creation readiness assessment of whether a charter-bus marketplace growing at 300% YoY can sustain that trajectory for five to eight years, and whether it is prepared to run as both a marketplace and a SaaS company after its imminent TMS launch.
solution: Confirmed the architecture supports continued growth and leadership is cohesive, with a 1–2 week release cadence as a key strength; flagged under-resourcing, missing technical-roadmap ownership, lack of integrated incident management, and below-average Infrastructure/SDLC/Organization scores; recommended assigning technical-roadmap ownership (OTC $50k–$100k, AC $250k–$500k), multi-AZ/multi-region cloud, a backlog-prioritization framework, and funding TMS R&D independently once early-adopter PoC is achieved.

summary: Hybrid-cloud mobile threat defense platform analyzing iOS and Android device logs to detect post-incident malicious activity for enterprise and government security operations teams, delivered as SaaS and on-premise for high-compliance customers.
challenge: Buy-side assessment of whether a lean mobile threat defense startup's hybrid-cloud architecture, SDLC, and organization can scale into an MTD suite for high-value C-Suite and government customers, despite immature DevOps, a single-region AWS footprint, and R&D running at 158% of revenue.
solution: Validated the proprietary mobile forensic IP — Docker/Java/Python with PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch, and FastText ML models — as defensible and low-risk; flagged single-node Docker Compose, hard-coded HTTP endpoints, no HA/autoscaling, single European AWS region, manual releases, missing OSS/security scanning, and key-person risk across VP Engineering and VP Customer Success; priced remediation (Kubernetes refactor, SOC 2, annual pen testing, 4–8 FTE build-out) at $271k–$810k one-time plus $2M–$4M over five years.

summary: Last-mile delivery logistics SaaS for B2B companies, providing dispatching dashboards, native driver apps, and route optimization for 1,200+ clients across 90 countries processing over four million deliveries monthly, built on a Node.js monolith with selective AWS Lambda serverless components.
challenge: Buy-side TDD assessing whether product architecture, infrastructure, processes, and organization can support 40% organic growth without disproportionate investment, and whether ETA and route-optimization capabilities can compete up-market.
solution: Confirmed AWS infrastructure, strong leadership tenure, mature dual-track Agile SDLC, and 25+ third-party integrations as key strengths; flagged the legacy Node.js monolith (CoffeeScript server, AngularJS front-end, O(n²) client-side data-filtering, manual compute scaling), underdeveloped active-navigation, missing CTO/Chief Architect and data-science team, manual CI/CD with 10% unit-test coverage, and a 7.7:1 developer-to-QA ratio; recommended hiring a CTO, CPO, and Senior Architect, an architectural-modernization assessment, JMeter load testing, SonarQube, GDPR review, and automated deployment.

summary: AI-powered platform delivering natural language understanding solutions for search, chat, and customer service to optimize user engagement.
challenge: Validating an AI/NLU customer service platform.
solution: Identified that legacy systems comprised significant portion of hosting costs and recommended a third-party vendor for cost-reduction.

summary: Research advisory portal aggregating analyst research and industry data through a customer portal integrated with professional workflows.
challenge: Assessing the technology maturity of a tech-enabled research services company for acquisition.
solution: Proprietary, aging technology platform and reporting capabilities identified as requiring extensive manual work.

summary: Integrating consumer insight platform into existing product SaaS platform. The acquired product leverages natural language processing to categorize social media data and identify emerging market trends.
challenge: Combinging acquired technology platform into portfolio company SaaS platform.
solution: Integrating disparate product architectures into near-term and designed future-state, combined platform architecture to support immediate revenue growth and cross-selling enablement.

summary: Global project management and cost consulting firm delivering large-scale construction and infrastructure projects across the Americas, EMEA, and Asia-Pacific, underpinned by Procore (PMIS), Deltek VantagePoint (ERP), and a Databricks analytics platform with emerging AI cost-benchmarking capabilities.
challenge: Preliminary buy-side TDD of a 2,500-person globally distributed project management firm spanning 20+ legal entities, evaluating platform fragmentation, security posture, integration-playbook maturity, and AI governance.
solution: Confirmed ISO 27001:2022 certification, a defense-in-depth security stack (BlueVoyant MDR, CrowdStrike EDR, ThreatLocker, Vanta), a tiered dual-datacenter DR program, and a proven three-stage integration playbook as strengths; flagged 82.47% IT service-desk SLA compliance (below the 90%+ norm), five of seven integration workstreams incomplete, EMEA entities outside the ISO boundary, and nascent AI governance as primary post-close areas (est. $100K–$200K).

summary: Multi-product talent acquisition SaaS suite spanning career websites, recruitment CRM, programmatic advertising, and skills assessment for enterprise recruiters, built on a Java/Angular core with Spark analytics and a squad-based engineering organization.
challenge: Post-acquisition de-risk workstream identifying stability, quality, and sustainability constraints across the SDLC, customer integration, and cloud cost governance to accelerate consolidation onto a single platform.
solution: Baselined the SDLC (60% Java / 20% Angular across ~200 GitHub repos, ~60% test coverage, Jenkins CI/CD self-scored 2–3/10, Spotify squads with unclear product mapping); flagged DevOps immaturity, knowledge islands around WordPress and Elasticsearch, ambiguous PO/PM roles, and missing sprint-capacity planning; recommended GitHub Actions/GitLab pipelines, MuleSoft for SmartPost refactoring, Domo metrics, LinearB, 15–25% tech-debt allocation, and containerizing services beyond CoreAPI.

summary: Global API-first recognition, loyalty, and incentives SaaS serving 14 million members across 500+ partner companies and 190+ countries, with an AI-personalized rewards storefront and a multi-experience motivation platform spanning social recognition, wellness, pulse surveys, and eco-action community programs.
engagementTypeDescription: Sell-side technical assessment and diligence readiness
challenge: Pre-diligence AI/ML readiness and data-strategy engagement preparing the company to present its data science capabilities, algorithm choices, and personalized-storefront technology for investor TDD, after prior missteps with third-party ML/AI.
solution: Validated AI/ML maturity behind the personalized rewards storefront and savings engine against the product's external positioning; ran a data SWOT and audited the data asset inventory; framed the seven-question test for when customer data creates durable competitive advantage; coached leadership on accurately communicating strengths and proactively mitigating risks during an investor TDD.
